readiness_basis: {{why this package has this readiness level}}

triggered_artifact_policy.actionability_bridge: When actionability is retained or changes thesis state, add actionability-bridge.md to support_artifacts.
triggered_artifact_policy.left_side_participation_check: When participation_stage is left_side_candidate, add left-side-participation-check.md to support_artifacts or record an explicit waiver/downgrade in notes.
triggered_artifact_policy.handoffs: When an artifact changes actionability, position review, portfolio review or thesis state, add the next loop or review target to handoffs.

must_refresh_if: {{specific event, filing, price move, estimate revision or macro release}}
